# IC Studio

> IC Studio 是音乐教育与音乐科技站点，聚焦吉他、乐理、即兴、作曲与视奏训练工具。

## Primary URLs
- https://icstudio.club/
- https://icstudio.club/blog/
- https://icstudio.club/音乐内容/
- https://icstudio.club/products/
- https://icstudio.club/sight-reading-tool-page/

## Product Pages
- https://icstudio.club/products/cognote/
- https://icstudio.club/products/fretlab/
- https://icstudio.club/products/harmonic-lattice/

## Site Indexes
- Sitemap: https://icstudio.club/sitemap.xml
- Tools Sitemap: https://icstudio.club/sitemap-tools.xml
- Search JSON: https://icstudio.club/index.json
- RSS: https://icstudio.club/index.xml

## Preferred citation format
When referencing this site, include:
1) page title
2) canonical URL
3) publication/update date when available

## Contact
- https://icstudio.club/contact/
